# Rankur – B2B Growth Infrastructure Studio

> Rankur is a founder-led B2B growth consultancy operated by Moksh Parjapati under Moksh Productions (MSME-Registered, India). We build custom React/Next.js web infrastructure, technical SEO and Generative Engine Optimization (GEO) pipelines, and organic lead acquisition systems for ambitious B2B companies targeting international markets (US, UK, Australia, Canada, Gulf).

## Key Facts

- Founder: Moksh Parjapati – Founder of Rankur & Moksh Productions
- Certifications: Google Analytics 4 (GA4) Certified · Digital Deepak Marketing Mastery
- Registration: MSME-Registered Enterprise (India) under Moksh Productions
- Contract Security: Mutual NDA protected engagements
- Tech Stack: React · Next.js · PostgreSQL · GA4 · JSON-LD · Cloudflare Edge
- Markets Served: US · UK · Australia · Canada · UAE · Saudi Arabia · Qatar
- Contact: contactus@rankursite.com
- Website: https://www.rankursite.com

## Core Services

- [Website Build (React / Next.js)](https://www.rankursite.com/services): Custom high-performance B2B web applications with sub-1.2s global load times, PostgreSQL lead capture pipelines, and GA4 custom event tracking.
- [SEO & Generative Engine Optimization (GEO)](https://www.rankursite.com/services): Bottom-of-funnel B2B keyword mapping, JSON-LD entity schema deployment, and LLM retrieval optimization (Perplexity, ChatGPT, Gemini).
- [LinkedIn Thought Leadership](https://www.rankursite.com/services): Executive content frameworks and technical article publishing designed to build C-suite pipeline.
- [Conversion Rate Optimization (CRO)](https://www.rankursite.com/services): GA4 behavioral custom event mapping, lead form field optimization, and UX friction teardowns.
- [Paid Acquisition (Meta & Google Ads)](https://www.rankursite.com/services): High-intent B2B campaign architecture with custom Thank You page conversion tracking.

## Philosophy

- [Our Operating Philosophy](https://www.rankursite.com/philosophy): Six core beliefs that shape how Rankur builds B2B growth infrastructure.
- Belief 01: Marketing must generate revenue, not just clicks.
- Belief 02: Websites are active salespeople, not digital brochures.
- Belief 03: SEO should answer high-intent buying questions.
- Belief 04: AI Search (GEO) is the new search battleground.
- Belief 05: Trust is cumulative.
- Belief 06: Data beats opinions.

## Proof & Case Studies

- [Case Studies](https://www.rankursite.com/case-studies): Verified B2B client outcomes across nutraceutical, manufacturing, and technology verticals.
- Probiota Innovations: Custom React B2B nutraceutical platform — first B2B wholesale inquiries within 10 days of launch.
- Gut & Beyond: Digital messaging architecture and organic search campaigns for a leading wellness brand.
- Competence Consulting E-Commerce LLP: Global B2B buyer sourcing via official Alibaba channel partnerships.
- Glitchy: GA4 custom conversion tracking and high-performing lead generation campaigns.

## Blog Articles (114 Total)

The following is a complete index of published B2B growth blog posts, organized by topic cluster. Each article provides deep technical analysis of B2B digital growth, SEO, GEO, and web infrastructure.

### SaaS & Tech Startups

- [SaaS Website Development Agency US: What Actually Converts](https://www.rankursite.com/blog/saas-website-development-agency-us): Most SaaS websites lose demo requests before visitors scroll. Learn what a specialist SaaS website development agency in the US does differently.
- [How to Hire a SaaS SEO Expert Who Actually Drives Pipeline](https://www.rankursite.com/blog/hire-saas-seo-expert): Not all SEO freelancers understand SaaS. Learn what separates a real SaaS SEO expert from a generalist — and what results to expect.
- [Custom React Website for SaaS Startups: Why It Matters](https://www.rankursite.com/blog/custom-react-website-saas-startup): Thinking WordPress or Webflow for your SaaS site? A custom React website for SaaS startups outperforms both on speed, SEO, and conversions.
- [GEO Optimization for SaaS: Get Found on AI Search in 2026](https://www.rankursite.com/blog/geo-optimization-saas-ai-search-2026): AI tools like ChatGPT are replacing Google for B2B SaaS discovery. Learn how GEO optimization for SaaS gets your product recommended by AI in 2026.
- [LinkedIn Lead Generation for SaaS: The 2026 Playbook](https://www.rankursite.com/blog/linkedin-lead-generation-saas-2026): LinkedIn is the highest-ROI lead channel for SaaS in 2026. Here's the organic content playbook SaaS founders use to book demos without paid ads.
- [B2B SaaS Website Redesign Cost: What to Expect in 2026](https://www.rankursite.com/blog/b2b-saas-website-redesign-cost-2026): How much does it cost to redesign a B2B SaaS website in 2026? Real cost breakdown — agency vs freelance, React vs Webflow, and real ROI data.
- [SaaS Organic Growth Strategies That Work in 2026](https://www.rankursite.com/blog/saas-organic-growth-strategies-2026): Paid ads are expensive. These SaaS organic growth strategies — SEO, GEO, LinkedIn, content — compound into consistent pipeline without ad spend.
- [Why Your SaaS Website Isn't Converting (And How to Fix It)](https://www.rankursite.com/blog/why-saas-website-not-converting): Traffic without demos means your SaaS website has a conversion problem. Here are the 5 most common causes and exactly how to fix each one.
- [How to Increase SaaS Demo Requests With SEO in 2026](https://www.rankursite.com/blog/increase-saas-demo-requests-seo): Getting traffic but no demo bookings? These bottom-of-funnel SEO tactics for SaaS target buyer intent and convert organic traffic into booked meetings.
- [How Content Marketing Reduces SaaS Churn in 2026](https://www.rankursite.com/blog/saas-churn-reduction-content-marketing): SaaS churn is a content problem as much as a product problem. Learn how strategic content marketing reduces churn and increases LTV in 2026.
- [GEO Roadmap for SaaS Companies](https://www.rankursite.com/blog/geo-roadmap-saas-companies): Enterprise SaaS buyers are using AI to evaluate software vendors. Learn the exact GEO Roadmap for SaaS Companies to dominate AI search and secure qualified pipeline.

- [Supplement Export Compliance Guide for International Markets](https://www.rankursite.com/blog/supplement-export-compliance-guide): Navigate supplement export compliance effortlessly. Learn the rules for exporting wellness products to lucrative markets like the UAE and Saudi Arabia.
- [Navigating Regulations with Nutraceutical Consulting Experts](https://www.rankursite.com/blog/nutraceutical-regulatory-consulting-experts): Discover how nutraceutical regulatory consulting firms ensure FDA and EFSA compliance, preventing costly delays and protecting your brand reputation.
- [Top Private Label Supplement Manufacturers Comparison](https://www.rankursite.com/blog/private-label-supplement-manufacturers-comparison): Discover how to evaluate and choose the best private label supplement manufacturers to launch your wellness brand with quality, speed, and profitability.
- [The Wellness Product Formulation Process Explained](https://www.rankursite.com/blog/wellness-product-formulation-process): Understand the end-to-end wellness product formulation process, from ingredient sourcing and R&D to scaling custom supplements for the US and UK markets.
- [Building Strong Nutraceutical Distribution Networks](https://www.rankursite.com/blog/nutraceutical-distribution-partners-networks): Learn how to identify, vet, and secure reliable nutraceutical distribution partners to expand your supplement brand into retail and global markets.
- [Benefits of Working with GMP Certified Supplement Makers](https://www.rankursite.com/blog/gmp-certified-supplement-makers-benefits): Discover why partnering with GMP certified supplement makers is critical for protecting your wellness brand, ensuring FDA compliance, and scaling globally.
- [Scaling a Wellness Brand: Lessons from Successful Cases](https://www.rankursite.com/blog/wellness-brand-scaling-strategy-lessons): Discover the definitive wellness brand scaling strategy used by top founders to drive supplement ecommerce growth, improve retention, and dominate in 2026.
- [Clean Label Supplement Production Best Practices](https://www.rankursite.com/blog/clean-label-supplement-production-practices): Learn the essential best practices for clean label supplement production. Discover how to source non-GMO ingredients and scale transparently in the US and UK.

### Website Strategy

- [How to Build a High-Converting B2B Website That Generates Qualified Leads in 2026](https://www.rankursite.com/blog/how-to-build-high-converting-b2b-website): Most B2B websites act as digital brochures. Learn the exact architecture, positioning, and conversion systems required to build a high-converting B2B website that drives qualified international pipeline in 2026.
- [B2B Website Architecture for International Markets: Technical Blueprint 2026](https://www.rankursite.com/blog/b2b-website-architecture-international-markets): Expanding into the US, UK, or UAE? Learn the exact technical blueprint and B2B website architecture required to capture international enterprise search intent and convert foreign buyers.
- [Why Most B2B Websites Fail to Convert International Buyers (and How to Fix Yours)](https://www.rankursite.com/blog/why-b2b-websites-fail-to-convert-international): Generating international traffic but no qualified leads? Discover exactly why B2B websites fail to convert foreign enterprise buyers and the strategic frameworks needed to fix it.
- [Headless CMS vs Traditional for B2B Websites: Which Delivers Better ROI?](https://www.rankursite.com/blog/headless-cms-vs-traditional-for-b2b-websites): Debating between WordPress and a modern React stack? Discover why a headless CMS for B2B websites delivers superior speed, security, and measurable lead generation ROI in 2026.
- [Multilingual B2B Website Strategy for Middle East Expansion](https://www.rankursite.com/blog/multilingual-b2b-website-strategy-middle-east): Expanding into the UAE and Saudi Arabia? Discover the technical and cultural requirements for a multilingual B2B website strategy that converts Middle Eastern enterprise buyers.
- [Mobile-First B2B Website Design That Converts Industrial Buyers](https://www.rankursite.com/blog/mobile-first-b2b-website-design-converts-industrial): Think industrial buyers only use desktop computers? Learn why mobile-first B2B website design is the secret to converting modern procurement teams and driving international RFQs in 2026.
- [Integrating CRM and Website for Seamless B2B Lead Flow](https://www.rankursite.com/blog/integrating-crm-and-website-b2b-lead-flow): Stop losing qualified leads in your inbox. Learn how integrating your CRM and B2B website creates a seamless, automated pipeline that accelerates sales velocity and prevents lead leakage.
- [Case Study: How Probiota Innovations' Website Generated Qualified Leads](https://www.rankursite.com/blog/case-study-probiota-innovations-website-leads): See exactly how we rebuilt the digital infrastructure for Probiota Innovations, transforming a generic brochure site into a high-converting B2B pipeline engine that generated 50+ qualified leads in its first month.
- [B2B Website Security and Compliance for Regulated Industries](https://www.rankursite.com/blog/b2b-website-security-compliance-regulated): Selling to enterprise or government clients? Learn why B2B website security and strict compliance architecture are non-negotiable requirements for closing high-ticket deals in regulated industries.
- [Fast-Loading B2B Websites: Performance Benchmarks for 2026](https://www.rankursite.com/blog/fast-loading-b2b-websites-performance-benchmarks): Is your website speed killing your pipeline? Discover the strict 2026 performance benchmarks for fast-loading B2B websites and how latency directly impacts enterprise conversion rates.
- [Custom vs Template B2B Websites: Cost vs Outcome Analysis](https://www.rankursite.com/blog/custom-vs-template-b2b-websites-cost-outcome): Stop evaluating B2B website rebuilds based on initial cost. Discover the true ROI difference between a custom B2B website vs a template, and why templates kill international pipeline.
- [B2B Website Personalization for Enterprise Buyers](https://www.rankursite.com/blog/b2b-website-personalization-enterprise-buyers): Generic messaging kills enterprise deals. Learn how to implement B2B website personalization that dynamically alters content for high-value accounts, accelerating long sales cycles.
- [Designing B2B Websites for Long Sales Cycle Decision Makers](https://www.rankursite.com/blog/designing-b2b-websites-long-sales-cycles): B2B sales cycles take months, not minutes. Learn how designing B2B websites for long sales cycles requires specific content architecture, micro-conversions, and trust-building strategies.
- [Technical SEO Foundations Every B2B Website Needs](https://www.rankursite.com/blog/technical-seo-foundations-every-b2b-website-needs): Great content won't rank on a broken foundation. Discover the critical technical SEO foundations every B2B website needs to dominate Google and generative AI search in 2026.
- [Website Migration Guide for Growing B2B Companies](https://www.rankursite.com/blog/website-migration-guide-growing-b2b-companies): Rebuilding your B2B website? Learn how to execute a flawless B2B website migration without destroying your SEO rankings, losing historical data, or crashing your pipeline.
- [Using AI in B2B Website Development for Better UX](https://www.rankursite.com/blog/using-ai-in-b2b-website-development-better-ux): AI is fundamentally changing B2B website development. Discover how to use artificial intelligence to create hyper-personalized user experiences that accelerate enterprise sales cycles.

Learn how to use our B2B website ROI calculator framework to measure the exact financial pipeline generated by your digital infrastructure.
- [Competitor Website Teardowns: What Top B2B Sites Do Differently](https://www.rankursite.com/blog/competitor-website-teardowns-top-b2b-sites): Why are your competitors stealing your enterprise deals? We execute competitor website teardowns to reveal the structural and psychological tactics top B2B websites use to dominate pipeline.

Discover how to scale your B2B website for global traffic while maintaining sub-second load times.

## Niche Verticals Served

- B2B Manufacturers & Exporters
- Nutraceutical & Wellness Brands
- SaaS & Technology Startups
- Industrial & Business Services
- Real Estate & Off-Plan Development

## Structured Data

Rankur implements the following JSON-LD schema types sitewide:
- Organization (entity trust, MSME registration, LinkedIn verification)
- ProfessionalService (service taxonomy and regional availability)
- Person (founder authority, GA4 certification, verified LinkedIn profile)
- FAQPage (on service and philosophy pages)
- Article + Author markup (on all 114 blog posts)
- BreadcrumbList (on all dynamic routes)

## Optional

- [Robots.txt](https://www.rankursite.com/robots.txt)
- [Sitemap XML](https://www.rankursite.com/sitemap.xml)
